items.title: 11th pick Yaxel Lendeborg is 23 years old, and will be 24 by the start of the NBA season. 18 players 23 years or older have been selected in the top 20 picks since 2000, 11 of which were in the lottery, and the best of them is Cam Johnson or Buddy Hield
items.author: Pickleskennedy1
items.body_excerpt: The list is as follows: Melvin Ely (12th overall pick) (5.3 points per game for his career, going to use that as an imperfect but somewhat telling baseline) Ekpe Udoh (6th pick) (3.5 points per game) Chris Duarte (13th pick) (7.6 points, out of league in four years) Rafael…
